questions: Is the treatment setting a tertiary care centre? (Yes/No)

What is the specific condition diagnosed? (e.g., autoimmune blistering disorder, collagen vascular disorder, life-threatening infection, severe viral infection, severe fungal infection, condition requiring immunosuppression, condition requiring IVIG/biological agents)
If the condition is a life-threatening infection, what antibiotic choice is preferred? (Azithromycin, Erythromycin, Other)
If immunosuppression is required, what immunosuppressant choice is preferred? (Cyclophosphamide, Azathioprine, Cyclosporine, Other)
Does the patient have severe renal impairment? (Yes/No)
